commentary_text: The market is substantially more confident in an Ivory Coast win than the model: sportsbooks assign 84% versus the model's 64%, a 20-percentage-point gap. The model also sees a draw as nearly twice as likely as the market does (25% versus 11%). This sharpening of conviction toward Ivory Coast could reflect recent-form patterns, injury status, or lineup changes that the model has not incorporated since its last update. The dashboard flags this divergence as a signal worth monitoring; it does not indicate which assessment is more reliable.
